title: USS Liberty: The full version of the NSA message 091448Z JUN 67 message, including the USN-467 (Cyprus) header

communications.subject: Freedom of Information Act Request: USS Liberty: The full version of the NSA message 091448Z JUN 67 message, including the USN-467 (Cyprus) header
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

We are seeking the full version of the NSA message 091448Z JUN 67, which includes the message’s headers, of which we have attached a portion in this request.

We understand it is contained in the National Archives and Records Administration (NARA):
•	Record Group: RG 457 (Records of the National Security Agency)
•	Series: NSA Cryptologic Documents Relating to the Attack on the USS Liberty
•	Box Number: Box 11 (Note: Box numbers may vary slightly following re-processing, but it is traditionally found in the "Product Messages" folders of the 1967 crisis.)
•	Folder: Messages - 1-15 June 1967

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Joe Meadors
